CoffeeSetupMug: set up the mug for the coffee machine
CoffeeServeMug: serve the coffee mug to the counter
CoffeePressButton: press the button on the coffee machine
PnPCounterToCab: pick object from counter and place in cabinet
PnPCabToCounter: pick object from cabinet and place on counter
PnPCounterToSink: pick object from counter and place in sink
PnPSinkToCounter: pick object from sink and place on counter
PnPCounterToMicrowave: pick object from counter and place in microwave
PnPMicrowaveToCounter: pick object from microwave and place on counter
PnPCounterToStove: pick object from counter and place on stove
PnPStoveToCounter: pick object from stove and place on counter
TurnSinkSpout: turn the sink spout to redirect water
